text:
Now I see the exact issue. `useGasFeeEstimations` defaults to `true` in the constructor. Our `useEffect` calls `createClient(...)` which creates the client with `useGasFeeEstimations: true` (default), then calls `client.configure({ useGasFeeEstimations: false })`. But **`configure` is called on the same tick** — so it should work.

Let me check what `useRelayChains` does — it may be creating its own client:
